title: たゆまぬ気魄【バトルクライ】

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm walking around the academy after
class has let out...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello there, Trainer. Good afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to the cafeteria for a costume
party.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to do something from a fantasy world,
so I decided to dress up as a cleric.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Underclassman
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Grass, you look wonderful! It suits you so
well!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... Hehe, thank you. I'm glad that I could do
this costume justice.

text_block_list.name: Underclassman with Braids
text_block_list.text:
And being a cleric with healing powers is just
perfect for you, too!
choice_data_list: You do have that calming vibe about you.
You do have that calming vibe about you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: My, I'm honored...

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Underclassman
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but I don't just mean her vibe. There was this
one time, back when we first enrolled...

text_block_list.name: Underclassman with Braids
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Oh, this is no good... No matter how hard I train, I keep falling behind...

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Underclassman
text_block_list.text: The standards at Tracen really are crazy high...

text_block_list.name: Underclassman with Braids
text_block_list.text:
You're right... It's like there's no point in even
trying anymore.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huuuh?! You're gonna do more, Grass?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But you just finished healing from your last injury.
I know tryouts are coming up, but if you push
yourself too hard...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I'm doing the rest of today's training
in the pool, to avoid straining my body too much.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Besides...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I have to do everything I possibly can. I don't
want to have any regrets.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If I tread too gingerly around minor setbacks, I
will never achieve the growth I desire.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Okay! Then I won't lose, either! Time
t'get serious!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. ♪ Why don't you join me for that swim,
then?

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Underclassman
text_block_list.text:
Whenever we're about to lose heart... we
remember those words and press on!

text_block_list.name: Underclassman with Braids
text_block_list.text:
Your magical words of courage healed us, in a
way. You gave us the courage we lost!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I gave you... courage?
choice_data_list: Now that does sound like your kind of magic.
Now that does sound like your kind of magic.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
While I'm grateful to my fans for their support... I
always run purely for my own sake.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...I never thought my efforts would inspire
someone else.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I suppose a cleric's healing magic can come in
many forms.
choice_data_list: You'll have to run your best to inspire the rest.
You should use your magic on me next time.
You should use your magic on me next time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I suppose a cleric's healing magic can come in
many forms.
choice_data_list: You'll have to run your best to inspire the rest.
You should use your magic on me next time.
You should use your magic on me next time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. In fact, the thought is raising my spirits
already. It makes me want to start running at
once.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As luck would have it, the party won't start for a
little while yet. A quick run shouldn't pose a
problem.

text_block_list.name: Underclassmen
text_block_list.text:
U-um! May we join you? We promise we won't get
in the way!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Just to be clear, I won't be holding
back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's stride is more powerful than ever
after making this new discovery.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No problem at all. Let's see... does it go like this?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Swoosh! ♪ I cast Heal!

text_block_list.name: Underclassmen
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Us, too, please!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Dear me. Then I'll cast magic on all of you at
once... Nature's Blessing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch Grass Wonder cast her magic, just
seeing the smile on her face is uplifting on its
own.
